{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220412266D636B74E9E14A5D9FC9"}"},"total":490},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7525874606818607934","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书构思完美，文笔飞扬，既显华美词藻，又彰明快节奏。金手指的设定也很好，主角人物的设定也很好，段落得宜，情节流畅，实乃一本非常值得细看的洪荒类小说。看得出，作者是十分用心了。加油！！！！！！给你五颗星，期待你的作品会更好。不过，你要在脑洞这一块加强，看这本书有喜有爽，非常遗憾的是没有惊。加油，以我一个读者的身份向你祝福和企福，你可以更好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752265007,"group_id":"7506042600034405438","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+poBvmSCz8DeuDP3bAtL2ppouEzCSAP5q/vHBi/Q6+5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700848&x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"1231916890602671","user_name":"喜欢羽扇豆的常晓素"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1231916890602671","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7506042600034405438","book_info":{"abstract":"【洪荒仙女+无敌+法宝+爆爽】秦牧穿越洪荒成为截教大师兄，在洪荒世界里将护短属性发挥到极致。
三宵姐妹被准提圣人觊觎，想要度化去西方，向大师兄哭诉，秦牧当即带领所有截教弟子杀向灵山。
封神之战，看谁还敢镇杀我截教弟子？
圣人又如何，欺我截教，屠之便是！
只要截教弟子受委屈，不管对错，先找回场子再说
